0.q: The rpoE2 mutant was more sensitive to hydrogen peroxide and paraquat than the wild type MR-1 strain, indicating that RpoE2 is involved in the oxidative stress responses.

1.q: expression of the pHERD30T-rpoE in trans did significantly enhance the transcription of chromosomal rseA locus in the MR-1 strain, indicating that the expression of the rpoE-rseABC gene cluster could be up-regulated by RpoE (i.e., autoregulation)
